summary: iter78 — DEMO_MASTER_CODE env var + danieligna1 protected super-admin + Demo Activity Log middleware/UI ALL VERIFIED. Backend pytest 22/22 PASS in 20.6s. ENV: DEMO_MASTER_CODE='0108' is read from /app/backend/.env; wrong code '9999' → 403 'Cod master incorect.'; default '0108' still accepted (backward compat verified via /admin/admin-accounts/change-password). PROTECTED: GET /admin-accounts returns protected_emails=['admin@propmanage.io','danieligna1@gmail.com'] (alphabetical), both rows is_protected=true; POST /admin-accounts/block-toggle on danieligna1 → 400 'protejat'; POST /admin-accounts/change-role on danieligna1 → 400. Owner login danieligna1@gmail.com/0108 → 200, role=admin scope=general. ACTIVITY MIDDLEWARE: marketing.admin called /api/admin/marketing/dashboard and /api/admin/marketing/performance/summary → 2.5s later super-admin GET /api/admin/demo-activity?email=marketing.admin returns ≥10 items with email/path/label/method/status_code/duration_ms/ts (ISO), label='Vizualizat Marketing Dashboard' present. Non-demo users (admin@propmanage.io super, danieligna1 owner) generate ZERO logs (verified). RBAC: client@propmanage.io on /demo-activity → 403 'Doar super-admin.'; non-super blocked on /summary too. FILTERS: email/days/q/limit all work; summary returns {since,days,total_actions,users[],global_top_pages[]} sorted desc by total_actions. FRIENDLY LABELS: '/api/admin/marketing/dashboard'→'Vizualizat Marketing Dashboard', '/api/admin/strategic-partners/cross-ref'→'Cross-Reference AI' confirmed in DB. FRONTEND /admin/demo-activity verified visually: [data-testid='demo-activity-page'] renders with [filters,search-q,email-filter,days-filter,apply-search,summary-totals,activity-table] all present. Summary card shows 'Total acțiuni: 10, în ultimele 7 zile'. Top users list shows marketing.admin@propmanage.io with MARKETING scope, '10 erori 10' (all 403 → all counted as errors), last_seen timestamp. Global top pages chips render: 'Vizualizat Marketing Dashboard 5, Vizualizat Forecast 1, Vizualizat Segments 1, Vizualizat Growth 1, Vizualizat Idei viitoare 1, Vizualizat Performance Summary 1'. Activity table renders 10 log rows with timestamp+email+scope badge+label+path+GET pill+amber 403 badge (4xx)+ms duration. AUDIT badge in page header. Direct URL navigation /admin/demo-activity works. REGRESSION: demo-accounts (≥6 items), admin-accounts (22+ with danieligna1 as 22nd protected) — all pass.
action_items: PRE-EXISTING / OUT-OF-SCOPE (not blocking iter78): marketing.admin@propmanage.io gets 403 on /api/admin/marketing/* because /app/backend/routes/auth.py::_enforce_admin_role force-promotes any user with admin_scope set to role='admin' on every login (lines 56-59). This overrides the seeded role=marketing_manager. Even if you DB-update role to marketing_manager, next login flips it back. The marketing endpoints (/app/backend/routes/marketing_growth.py line 45) accept role=admin only when admin_scope is in {general, ai} — marketing.admin has scope='marketing' which fails the check. Activity-log task is unaffected (acceptance criteria explicitly accept 200 OR 403). To FIX in a future iter, either: (a) extend the allowed-scope set in marketing_growth.py to include 'marketing'; or (b) skip _enforce_admin_role's role-overwrite when the user already has a valid sub-admin role like marketing_manager.

OPTIONAL polish: in DemoActivityPage.jsx, the 'top users' click-to-filter toggle technically works but isn't observable when only 1 user has logs in the period (clicking sets emailFilter then clicking again clears it — both states show same N rows because there's only 1 user). Consider adding a visible state indicator (e.g., highlight border + 'X clear filter' chip).
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/routes/demo_activity.py (187 lines) is clean: schedule_log is fire-and-forget via asyncio.create_task, swallows RuntimeError when no loop, guards on is_demo_sub_admin flag, skips noisy endpoints (/auth/me, /health, /demo-activity itself). _friendly_label uses prefix-startswith match with fallback 'Admin · <path>' / 'API · <path>'. Mongo aggregate pipelines for summary look correct.

/app/backend/routes/admin_accounts.py: PROTECTED_EMAILS is a set, properly used in _check_not_protected. MASTER_CODE reads os.environ.get('DEMO_MASTER_CODE','0108'). protected_emails returned as sorted list (deterministic for tests).
Activity middleware is wrapped in try/except in server.py (fire-and-forget). Even logs failed/403 requests intentionally for security audit — good design choice.

Minor: ACTION_LABELS uses 'startswith' matching with first-match-wins on a list — order matters. Specific routes (campaigns/generate) MUST be listed before generic prefixes (campaigns) — and they correctly are.

Pre-existing arch smell (out-of-iter78): _enforce_admin_role auto-overwrites role for any user with admin_scope to 'admin'. This breaks sub-admins seeded with role=marketing_manager. Either drop the auto-overwrite for non-empty roles in the allowed set, or accept admin+scope=marketing in the marketing endpoint.
updated_files: DB patch: db.users.update_one({email:'marketing.admin@propmanage.io'},{$set:{role:'marketing_manager'}}) — applied as instructed, but auto-reverted by _enforce_admin_role on next login (see action items).
test_credentials: Super: admin@propmanage.io / 1!nasov01ADMIN. Owner: danieligna1@gmail.com / 0108 (NEW protected super-admin, login OK). Marketing demo: marketing.admin@propmanage.io / Mkt!Demo2026Strong (logins OK, role auto-set to 'admin' by _enforce_admin_role on every login). Client: client@propmanage.io / Client123!. Auth via httpOnly cookies (use requests.Session()).
seed_data_creation: Tests generated ~15 demo_activity_logs rows via marketing.admin calls to /api/admin/marketing/dashboard, /performance/summary, /strategic-partners/cross-ref. No cleanup required (logs are audit data). Password change test set marketing.admin pw to 'Mkt!Demo2026Strong' (same as default → idempotent).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter78 fully verified. Auth uses cookie-based JWT (use requests.Session()). DEMO_MASTER_CODE='0108' from env. PROTECTED_EMAILS={admin@propmanage.io, danieligna1@gmail.com} — both protected against block/role-change; password change still allowed for super-admin rotation. Demo activity logging is fire-and-forget asyncio task triggered by middleware in server.py after each /api/* request when request.state.user.is_demo_sub_admin is True. Skip list: /auth/me, /health, /_health, /admin/demo-activity*. Friendly labels in ACTION_LABELS use startswith first-match. Login response role for marketing.admin is 'admin' (not 'marketing_manager') due to auth.py::_enforce_admin_role — verify via DB or activity log path/label, not login response role.
rca of the issue: N/A — no iter78 bugs found. One pre-existing arch issue documented in action_items (role-promotion overrides seeded marketing_manager). Not in iter78 scope; acceptance criteria explicitly allow 403 status codes in activity logs.
